name: Privacy Voting
description: Dregg-native polls: factory-born poll cells (monotone tallies, write-once question/close) and per-voter ballot cells (one vote per cell via WriteOnce). Voting rules are enforced by slot caveats on the substrate, not app bookkeeping.

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed two-cell DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; DeosApp::mount yields the axum router
deos.two_cell: the POLL cell is the agent's own (cipherclerk.cell_id()); the BALLOT cell is a distinct companion (ballot_cell_id = derive_raw(pk, SEEDED_BALLOT_TOKEN)), birthed into the same embedded ledger via EmbeddedExecutor::ensure_cell + an agent cap so the cast_vote fire reaches its live state. BOTH cells are seeded (seed_poll + seed_ballot) or fires fail-closed.
deos.publish: Signature (the POLL tally-board cell is a dregg:// sturdyref a peer on another federation reacquires)

affordances.view_poll: cap-only, Signature (a VIEWER reads the public tally board) — on the POLL cell
affordances.cast_vote: GATED (cap∧state), Either — ballot-unset precondition (VOTE==0); the fire submits the FULL vote (poll_ref + vote), the executor re-enforcing WriteOnce(VOTE) — on the BALLOT cell
affordances.record_tally: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — poll-open precondition (CLOSED==0); the fire reads the live tally and writes live+1, the executor re-enforcing Monotonic(TALLY_*) — on the POLL cell
affordances.close_poll: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — poll-open precondition (CLOSED==0); the fire sets CLOSED:=1, the executor re-enforcing WriteOnce(CLOSED) — on the POLL cell

deos.seam: CLOSED — the fires run against the seeded cells carrying the slot caveats, so a DOUBLE VOTE (rewriting the ballot's VOTE, WriteOnce(VOTE)), a TALLY REWIND (Monotonic(TALLY_YES)), and a POLL RE-OPEN (CLOSED 1->0, WriteOnce(CLOSED)) BITE in the deos fire/submission path (tests/deos_seam.rs)
